title: Aglaomorpha ledermannii

This fern species belongs to the family Polypodiaceae and the genus Aglaomorpha. More specifically, it is classified as Aglaomorpha ledermannii (Hieron.) H.Itô. The classification system used for Aglaomorpha ledermannii is based on the traditional botanical classification.
